title: INFLUENCE Of DIPLOMACY TO LANGUAGE CHANGE
author: Ro'zixon Yoqubjonova
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This research intends to present the position of English language in 

 terms of its diplomacy. The method that is deployed in this research mixed, i.e. 

 qualitative and quantitative, where the survey and interviews were performed 

  with the individuals.
